'''mapacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanoimine|cyanoimine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanoimine|cyanoimine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mapacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæpæchæth|mæpæchæth]] || [[word:mæpæchæj|mæpæchæj]] || [[word:mæpæchæsh|mæpæchæsh]] || [[word:mæpæchæ|mæpæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mapapachath|mapapachath]] || [[word:mapapachaj|mapapachaj]] || [[word:mapapachash|mapapachash]] || [[word:mapapacha|mapapacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mapachath|mapachath]] || [[word:mapachaj|mapachaj]] || [[word:mapachash|mapachash]] || [[word:mapacha|mapacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mapafchath|mapafchath]] || [[word:mapafchaj|mapafchaj]] || [[word:mapafchash|mapafchash]] || [[word:mapafchaf|mapafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mapachatha|mapachatha]] || [[word:mapachaja|mapachaja]] || [[word:mapachasha|mapachasha]] || [[word:mapachaka|mapachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mapachath|mapachath]] || [[word:mapachaj|mapachaj]] || [[word:mapachash|mapachash]] || [[word:mapacha|mapacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mapachathal|mapachathal]] || [[word:mapachajal|mapachajal]] || [[word:mapachashal|mapachashal]] || [[word:mapachakal|mapachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mapachathatha|mapachathatha]] || [[word:mapachajaja|mapachajaja]] || [[word:mapachashasha|mapachashasha]] || [[word:mapachaka|mapachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mapachathan|mapachathan]] || [[word:mapachajan|mapachajan]] || [[word:mapachashan|mapachashan]] || [[word:mapachakan|mapachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mapachathaoro|mapachathaoro]] || [[word:mapachajaoro|mapachajaoro]] || [[word:mapachashaoro|mapachashaoro]] || [[word:mapachakaoro|mapachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
